prompt: We are a 45-person aerospace engineering firm that recently won our first DoD contract. The contract contains DFARS 252.204-7021 requiring CMMC Level 2. We have never heard of CMMC before. Give us a plain-English explanation of what CMMC Level 2 means for us, what we need to do, and roughly how long it will take to get certified.
assertions: Explains CMMC Level 2 correctly: 110 security requirements drawn from NIST SP 800-171 (Rev 2) protecting Controlled Unclassified Information (CUI), codified in the 32 CFR Part 170 program rule

Distinguishes the two Level 2 assessment tracks: self-assessment (for select non-critical contracts) vs third-party C3PAO certification assessment (most CUI contracts), with triennial certification plus annual affirmation by a senior official

Explains prerequisite mechanics: SPRS score submission (Basic Assessment against 800-171), SSP requirement, and that DFARS 252.204-7012 obligations (incl. 72-hour DIBNET incident reporting) continue to apply
Gives a realistic readiness timeline for a first-timer (commonly 9-18 months of remediation before assessment) rather than promising quick certification
Recommends concrete first steps: scope where CUI lives, consider an enclave, gap-assess against 800-171, build SSP and POA&M, then schedule a C3PAO
